name: Honey Peanut Butter Ice Cream Squares
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Gallon Vanilla Ice Cream, Slightly Softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Line a 9-inch square baking pan with aluminum foil, extending the foil over the edges.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine all crust ingredients. Beat at medium speed until crumbly, scraping the bowl often.
4. Press the mixture onto the bottom of the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 12 to 20 minutes or until lightly browned. Allow to cool completely.
6. In a small bowl, stir together peanut butter, corn syrup, and honey.
7. Spread half of the peanut butter mixture over the crust.
8. Spread half of the ice cream over the peanut butter layer.
9. Drop spoonfuls of the remaining peanut butter mixture over the ice cream and sprinkle with 1/2 cup peanuts.
10. Spread and swirl the remaining ice cream over the peanuts.
11. Sprinkle with the remaining peanuts.
12. Freeze for 8 hours or overnight, until firm.
13. To serve, lift the ice cream square from the pan using the aluminum foil as handles. Remove the foil and cut into squares. Serve immediately.
